channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Deer poacher imprisoned, receives largest fine in Ohio history
item.description: Christopher Alexander, 28, was ordered to pay the maximum restitution fine of $35,071.73, the largest restitution value for a single white-tailed deer in Ohio’s history.
item.dc:creator: Adam Conn, NewsNation

item.title: Is that a drone or a plane? Experts help explain the differences
item.description: Drones are being spotted all over the U.S. But are those flashing lights in the sky really airplanes.
item.dc:creator: John Seewer And Mark Scolforo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Two charged in connection with Iran drone strike that killed 3 US troops in the Middle East
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Two men, including a dual Iranian American citizen, have been arrested on charges that they exported sensitive technology to Iran that was used in a drone attack in Jordan that killed three American troops early this year and injured dozens of other service members, the Justice Departm
item.dc:creator: STEVE LEBLANC, ERIC TUCKER and TARA COPP, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How to contact the Rhode Island cyberattack call center after data breach
item.description: Rhode Island officials urged residents to take immediate steps to protect themselves on Saturday, warning that the hackers could release personal data.
item.dc:creator: Leah Crowley, NewsNation

item.title: Bud Light no longer the best-selling draft beer at bars, data suggests
item.description: The overtaking of Bud Light as America's most popular draft beer has been "years in the making," according to the founder of Draftline Technologies, a company that provides software for beverage distributors.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Man sentenced for helping pregnant Chinese women travel to give birth in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A California man was sentenced Monday to nearly 3 1/2 years in prison for running an extensive business that helped pregnant Chinese women travel to the United States to deliver babies who would automatically have American citizenship. U.S.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump announces $100 billion investment from SoftBank
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is celebrating an announcement from Japanese technology company, SoftBank, that it plans to invest $100 billion into U.S. projects in the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Brandt, Fox 5

item.title: 16-year-old killed entire family, called 911, police say
item.description: BELEN, N.M. (KRQE) – On Sunday, New Mexico State Police (NMSP) released the names of the four victims from Saturday's homicide in Belen. Police said that 16-year-old Diego Leyva called 911 early Saturday morning and told the dispatcher he had killed his family.
item.dc:creator: Scott Brown, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge sentences Zephen Xaver, man who executed 5 women at Florida bank, to death
item.description: Zephen Xaver pleaded guilty to five counts of murder for killing Ana Piñon Williams, Debra Cook, Marisol Lopez, Cynthia Watson and Jessica Montague at a SunTrust Bank in Sebring, Florida in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Marino, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ingrid Lewis-Martin, chief adviser to NYC Mayor Eric Adams, resigns and expects to be indicted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ingrid Lewis-Martin, a former top aide to New York Mayor Eric Adams, expects to be indicted on criminal charges related to alleged improper gifts, her lawyer said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump’s Mar-a-Lago press conference
item.description: President-elect Trump gave his first formal press conference since winning election last month, during which he announced a major Softbank investment in the U.S. and fielded a bevy of questions from reporters at Mar-a-Lago.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the U.S. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why. New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy and U.S. Sen.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Latest: Teacher and a student killed in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: A student opened fire at a private Christian school Monday morning in Wisconsin, killing a teacher and another student in the final week before Christmas break.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden establishes a national monument for Frances Perkins, the 1st female Cabinet secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Monday established a national monument honoring the late FDR-era Labor Secretary Frances Perkins, the first woman to serve in a presidential Cabinet and a driving force behind Franklin D. Roosevelt's New Deal programs after the Great Depression.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, AAMER MADHANI and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Teacher and student killed, 6 injured in Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: A teacher and a student were killed in a shooting at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, police said Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Devin Willems, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Teacher and a teenage student killed in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: Police say a teenage student opened fire with a handgun at a private Christian school in Wisconsin, killing a teacher and another teenager.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Watch: Biden speaks at Labor Department
item.description: President Biden spoke early Monday afternoon at the Labor Department to highlight his administration's efforts to strengthen America's workforce.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump, Softbank CEO announce $100B SoftBank investment in the US
item.description: resident-elect Donald Trump will join SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son at his Florida home on Monday to announce that the Japanese company is planning to invest $100 billion in U.S. projects over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ivy League suspect in CEO murder huddles with legal team, not family: sources
item.description: Alleged CEO Killer Luigi Mangione has not met with any members of his family since his arrest, Fox News has learned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Beauty store owner killed while trying to defend business from shoplifters
item.description: A Florida mom and business owner was reportedly killed while trying to stop shoplifters at her beauty supply store, leaving behind two daughters just weeks before the holidays.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drone detectors in New Jersey have found 'little or no evidence' of wrongdoing, governor says
item.description: Drone-detecting devices deployed in New Jersey within the past week have shown little to no evidence of anything nefarious or threatening.
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins And Bianca Vázquez Toness, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: JonBenet Ramsey's dad suggests daughter’s killer motivated by money in resurfaced interview
item.description: The killer of JonBenet Ramsey, who was murdered in her Colorado home in 1996, may have been motivated by money, her father told Barbara Walters in a resurfaced interview.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mysterious drones leave officials perplexed
item.description: With drone sightings spreading through the East Coast, federal officials are helping local and state authorities.
item.dc:creator: Basil John, WGN 9

item.title: As schools cut back on bus service, parents turn to rideshare apps
item.description: Reliance on school buses has been waning for years as districts struggle to find drivers and more students attend schools far outside their neighborhoods.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Suburban New York police agency made illegal arrests, strip searched nearly every arrestee: DOJ
item.description: A New York police force regularly violated the civil rights of its residents, including by conducting illegal strip searches, the DOJ said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump girds for battle with Democrats, Supreme Court over birthright citizenship
item.description: President-elect Trump, Democratic lawmakers and the Supreme Court are on a collision course over restricting birthright citizenship, which Trump has identified as a top priority for his incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Speaker Johnson faces 'complicated' decision on crucial Rules Committee chair
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is barreling into a tricky — yet critical — decision over whom to appoint as the next chair of the House Rules Committee, a post that will set the tone for legislating and play a key role in keeping Republicans united in next year’s ultrathin majority.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego man dies after being mauled by his own dogs: police
item.description: A man was mauled by his three dogs at a neighborhood park Thursday afternoon, according to the San Diego Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, KRON4

item.title: Godiva steps in to help Metropolitan Ministries during holiday rush
item.description: The iconic pink Godiva truck brought treats for families and volunteers, but their real gift was a $25,000 donation to help restock shelves that have been emptying faster than ever.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers struggle to reach deal to avert government shutdown
item.description: Congressional negotiators are struggling to reach a deal to keep the government's lights on past Dec. 20. Text of a continuing resolution (CR) for a government funding package was expected Sunday ahead of the looming shutdown deadline.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, Fox 5

item.title: US agencies should use advanced technology to identify mysterious drones, Schumer says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — After weeks of fear and bewilderment about the drones buzzing over parts of New York and New Jersey, elected officials are urging action to identify and stop the mysterious flights. “There’s a lot of us who are pretty frustrated right now,” Rep. Jim Himes, D-Conn.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS and DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Law enforcement, Humane Society rescue hundreds of animals in alleged cruelty case
item.description: Pigs on the property had no sign of access to food or water, while the goats had a frozen water trough.
item.dc:creator: Mario Gonzalez/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: California DMV apologizes for Cybertruck's license plate but family cites misinterpretation
item.description: On Thursday, the license plate in question, which was on a Tesla Cybertruck, was spotlighted in a post to X by StopAntisemitism, a group “dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism.” The family, however, argues it is being misread.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Texas company says baby poop and fungi could be the solution to plastic waste
item.description: A dirty diaper may be gross to you, but one Texas company believes it could be the secret ingredient to helping answer an environmental question: How do we clean up all of our plastic waste?
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, WGN 9
